headlines.title: Trump arrives in China for high-stakes summit
headlines.description: President Trump arrived in Beijing for a critical summit where he said he will push for China's leader to "open up" China to American businesses. NBC Nightly News anchor Tom Llamas reports.

headlines.title: Inside China’s push for more marriages and children
headlines.description: The one child policy has left a lasting impact on Chinese society, where marriage and birth rates are both very low. That’s why the Chinese government is now instituting programs to encourage people to have children and get married. NBC News’ Janis Mackey Frayer has the story.

headlines.title: The Great Wall is being restored one brick at a time
headlines.description: BEIJING — Old Cheng was waiting patiently at the bottom of a steep mountain ridge as the minivans carrying our news team snaked their way through the Yan mountains to meet him.

headlines.title: Chinese EVs take the world by storm — except in the U.S.
headlines.description: China loves electric cars: making them, driving them and selling them to the rest of the world.

headlines.title: How will Trump's China trip differ from his 2017 visit?
headlines.description: How will Trump's China trip differ from his 2017 visit?

headlines.title: Trump arrives in China for Xi summit
headlines.description: Air Force One landed at Beijing Capital International Airport in China. Trump’s state visit includes a bilateral meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping. He is the first U.S. president to visit China since his last state visit in 2017 during his first term.

headlines.title: Here's what's on Trump's to-do list in China
headlines.description: Here's what's on Trump's to-do list in China

headlines.title: Alex Murdaugh’s convictions for murder of wife and son overturned
headlines.description: In a unanimous ruling, the South Carolina Supreme Court found former court clerk Becky Hill improperly influenced jurors during the trial. Prosecutors say they plan to retry the case. NBC News’ Laura Jarrett reports.

headlines.title: Democrats turn to state legislative races to catch up in the redistricting battle
headlines.description: After a series of court rulings gave Republicans a decisive advantage in the national redistricting fight, Democrats’ options for a counterpunch before this year’s midterms are limited.

headlines.title: Utah grief author sentenced to life in prison in husband’s poisoning death
headlines.description: The Utah grief author convicted of murder after prosecutors said she laced her husband’s cocktail with a fatal dose of fentanyl was sentenced to life in prison without parole on what would have been his 44th birthday.

headlines.title: Vance says Trump administration is withholding $1.3 billion in Medicaid payments to California
headlines.description: Vice president JD Vance announced that the Trump administration will be deferring $1.3 billion in Medicaid reimbursements to the state of California. Vance also said the administration will be sending letters to states to aggressively pursue Medicaid fraud or risk losing funds.

headlines.title: CDC encourages cruise ship passengers to remain at Omaha facility
headlines.description: The CDC says it is encouraging the cruise ship passengers exposed to a deadly Hantavirus outbreak to remain at the special medical facility in Nebraska for the entirety of their 42 day monitoring period. NBC News’ Camila Bernal reports.
